purpose: Reference inventory for folding docs/developer-guides/ (phase 5). 20 files, 1809 lines. Each guide is an operational checklist with uniform shape: Goal / When To Use / Blast Radius / Required Touch Points / Recommended Order / Verification / Common Misses / Related / References. The guides route agents through extension work but overlap with skills/*/SKILL.md content.

architecturalQuestion.question: Do developer-guides content belong IN skills or DECOUPLED from skills?
architecturalQuestion.currentState: Skills route TO developer-guides (e.g., skills/doppler-convert/SKILL.md:25 points at docs/developer-guides/04-conversion-config.md). Two-layer indirection with overlap.

options.name: inline-into-skills
options.description: Copy each guide's content into the relevant SKILL.md. Skills become ~200-line files. docs/developer-guides/ goes to 0. Skills become self-contained.
options.tradeoff: Bigger SKILL.md. Easier agent routing (single file read). No cross-guide reuse — composite guides would duplicate atomic-guide content.

options.name: sibling-files
options.description: Move each guide next to its home skill: skills/doppler-convert/04-conversion-config.md. SKILL.md keeps routing bullets but to relative paths. Skill system must support multi-file skills (verify with agents:verify).
options.tradeoff: Preserves per-guide atomicity. Composite guides still link multi-skill. Requires skill-system support.

options.name: shrink-and-keep
options.description: Keep docs/developer-guides/ but delete content that duplicates skills or style guides. Convert README.md to a pure routing table. Keep atomic guides only when they add operational detail the skill doesn't.
options.tradeoff: Least disruptive. Preserves human-browseable docs tree. Doesn't actually collapse the layer.

options.name: delete-after-porting
options.description: Port unique operational detail into the relevant skill (2-3 bullets each), then delete docs/developer-guides/ entirely.
options.tradeoff: Strongest fold. Loses the human-browsable extension map. AGENTS.md and skills must update in lockstep.

architecturalQuestion.recommendation: sibling-files — best match for the existing pattern where skills are the task-playbook home for agents, and developer-guides have always been task-oriented. Requires one investigation: does tools/verify-agent-parity.js allow multi-file skills? If yes, mechanical move. If no, switch to inline-into-skills.

skills.mirror: .agents/skills/ has the same reference count (physical copy).

guides.proposedDestination: shrink — convert to a 20-line routing table pointing at the new homes. Or delete if all guides move into skills.
Keep (still referenced from README.md:167). If guides move into skills, retarget to skills/ and rename skill-template.md.

guides.title: Add a Runtime Profile
guides.rationale: Runtime profiles are the debug/bench tunable surface.

guides.title: Assign an Existing Chat Template
guides.rationale: Chat-template assignment is part of model setup.

guides.title: Model Family Configs Are Removed
guides.rationale: Pure historical/deprecation marker. Consider converting to a brief note in doppler-convert about why family configs were removed.

guides.title: Add a Manifest or Runtime Contract Field
guides.rationale: Schema + merge + parser + tests — lives in the conversion+config domain.

guides.title: Add a Built-In Chat Template Formatter
Add a Sampling Strategy or Sampling Knob
guides.rationale: Sampling is a runtime/inference knob, not kernel work.

guides.title: Add a WGSL Kernel or Kernel Variant
Add a Command-Surface Command
guides.rationale: Command-surface parity sits in the debug/bench agent surface.
blockers: tests/config/diffusion-gpu-contract-docs.test.js references docs/style/command-interface-design-guide.md; this guide sits downstream of that style guide.

guides.title: Add a Quantization Format
guides.rationale: Primary work is converter + loader; kernels follow.

guides.title: Add a New Model Family Within an Existing Pipeline
guides.rationale: Composite of 03/04/07/08. Lives with the onboarding agent.

guides.title: Add a New Pipeline Family or ModelType Ecosystem
guides.rationale: Largest extension path; composite of composite-model-family plus pipeline work.

guides.title: Model Onboarding Playbook
guides.proposedDestination: keep-as-doc or inline-into-skills.doppler-convert — 532 lines is too much to inline cleanly. If sibling-files is adopted, this lives at skills/doppler-convert/model-onboarding-playbook.md.
blockers: Heavily linked from the developer-guides README (row 1). The playbook is the recommended starting point for model onboarding work, so link targets must update in lockstep.

summaryByDestination.notes: Counts include both primary and composite guides. Command-surface (12) touches both debug and bench; quantization-format (14) touches both convert and kernel-reviewer. Tag placement is primary; secondary routes are alsoRouteFrom.

recommendedOrder.action: Choose an architecture option from architecturalQuestion. Until this decides, do not move any guide file.
recommendedOrder.blocker: Need a signal from the user or evidence from tools/verify-agent-parity.js on whether multi-file skills are supported.

recommendedOrder.action: If sibling-files: git mv each atomic guide to skills/<target>/<guide>.md, update SKILL.md routing bullets to relative paths, update docs/developer-guides/README.md to redirect links. AGENTS.md gets one sentence change.
Shrink docs/developer-guides/README.md to a redirect table pointing at the new skill-adjacent homes. Keep _template.md only if any guides remain under docs/developer-guides/.
Move model-onboarding-playbook.md last — it is the largest file and the highest-linked.
